'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 97''' was the ninety-seventh issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[November 5]], [[2003]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*[[Thrawn campaign|The Thrawn Campaign]]
*[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]]
*[[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]]
*[[Naga Sadow/Legends|Naga Sadow]]
*[[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] - [[:Category:Creatures of Coruscant|Animals]]
*Air and space traffic control
*[[Moon moth/Legends|Moon moth]]
*[[Jedi apparel/Legends|Jedi field equipment]]
